display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Sparkle, Ritwik, Laura, and Natasha.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Get A Beautiful New Smile in 24 Hours
programme.desc: The Wellness Hour: Dr. Alvarez explores how Nuvia delivers a beautiful new smile in just 24 hours.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: The show where every word counts! Hosted by Meredith Vieira, two teams of celebrities and civilians face off in a fast-paced word game with a top prize of $10,000.

programme.title: Beat the Bridge
programme.desc: An interactive bridge dares players to cross by stepping on the right answers to challenging trivia questions; each step forward puts money in the team's bank, with bonus money for each successful crossing.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Switch
programme.desc: Jeff Hephner challenges contestants who are ranked based on their answers to trivia questions for a chance at $10,000; every question counts, as each answer can propel them to the top or to the bottom, where they'll be in jeopardy of elimination.

programme.title: Split Second
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins presents three contestants with a question and three possible choices and whoever buzzes in fastest earns the right to answer first.

programme.title: Tic Tac Dough
programme.desc: Two contestants compete to place three marks in a row on trivia board avoiding a dragon that can steal turns; the winner faces the dragon in a final round where it blocks three-in-a-row attempts to prevent the $10,000 prize win.

programme.title: Bingo Blitz
programme.desc: Contestants compete in a dynamic blend of trivia and bingo.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: Two teams of friends and family race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Ware family vs. Sawtelle family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Ware family vs. Schneider family.

programme.title: Family Feud Favorites
programme.desc: "Family Feud" has seen some crazy moments over the years, so buckle up as we revisit these fan favorites.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants London Hughes, Fortune Feimster and Bobby Berk.

programme.title: Celebrity Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Mira Sorvino, Adam Rodriguez and Peter Schrager.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Teams of two everyday people battle trivia questions and a 40-foot wall for the chance to win millions of dollars. Part smarts, part luck and part guts, their victory is as unpredictable as the bounce of the ball.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Ware family vs. Hunt family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Hammock family vs. Hunt family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Evans family vs. Hunt family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Schneider family vs. Hunt family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Schneider family vs. Rozier family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Schneider family vs. Pickett family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Healthy Joints for Life With Rich Diana
programme.desc: Healthy Joints for Life! Episode 1 of world-renowned orthopedist and longevity researcher Dr. Rich Diana's new series on healthy aging; learn about the real causes behind joint aging, and the promising new drug, supplement and therapy options.

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Gospel of Christ
programme.desc: The Gospel of Christ with Ben Bailey - Taking the Whole Gospel to the Whole World.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: Dr. Drew Pinsky and Dan Bucatinsky take on Betsy Brandt and Lisa Ann Walter.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: Two teams composed of celebrities and civilians go against each other in a fast-paced word game; guest stars Jessica Tuck, Nicole Sullivan, Lisa Kudrow and Illeana Douglas.

programme.title: Beat the Bridge
programme.desc: Three friends work together as they attempt to cross an iconic, interactive bridge by answering a series of general knowledge trivia questions where the game board is literally beneath their feet.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Switch
programme.desc: Jeff Hephner challenges contestants who are ranked based on their answers to trivia questions for a chance at $10,000; every question counts, as each answer can propel them to the top or to the bottom, where they'll be in jeopardy of elimination.

programme.title: Split Second
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins presents three contestants with a question and three possible choices and whoever buzzes in fastest earns the right to answer first.

programme.title: Tic Tac Dough
programme.desc: Brooke Burns hosts this exciting remake of the iconic game show, as two contestants compete head-to-head, answering trivia questions to earn plays on a giant game board, while the mischievous dragon tries to outwit their every move.

programme.title: Bingo Blitz
programme.desc: Contestants compete in a dynamic blend of trivia and bingo.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: Two teams face off to guess Americans' responses to questions covering every topic under the sun; John Michael Higgins hosts.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Maggie Sajak competes against "Jeopardy!" hosts Ken Jennings and Mayim Bialik; Pat Sajak's daughter Maggie fills in for Vanna at the board.

programme.title: Celebrity Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Dulé Hill, Sheryl Underwood and Peter Facinelli.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Teams of two everyday people battle trivia questions and a 40-foot wall for the chance to win millions of dollars. Part smarts, part luck and part guts, their victory is as unpredictable as the bounce of the ball.

programme.desc: A look at the Bears, the Bears' NFC North division rivals, and the NFL at large with insightful, analytical, and entertaining content every day.

programme.desc: Prosvent is a doctor-formulated blend of rejuvenating herbs and nutrients that help protect overall prostate health.

programme.title: Going To The Bathroom Too Much?
programme.desc: Better Bladder is a new safe and natural alternative to drugs, surgery and adult diapers. 90 percent see fewer bathroom visits, leaks & accidents. Tune in for a special TV offer!

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Kash & Matty Talkin' Golf
programme.desc: Award winning golf journalist Steve Kashul, and Chicago area golf guru Matt Smith talk golf covering top Chicago area, Midwest, and national golf topics. Discussions include golf courses, equipment, apparel, and include interviews with golf personalities, tour pros, top swing instructors, and celebrities.

programme.title: Retro Review Show
programme.desc: Ronnie Whelan joins Neil Mellor to analyse the action and talk through the stats from the 1983 League Cup win over Manchester United.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of memorable goals scored by Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: Goal Rush: U18 Season So Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool U18's 2025/26 season.

programme.title: Goal Rush: U21 Season so Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool U21s 2025/26 season.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: European Royalty: The Joy of Six
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary in which we relive Liverpool's sixth European Cup victory in Madrid - and the subsequent parade which brought the city to a standstill.

programme.title: Goal Rush: Premier League Season So Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool's Premier League season so far.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Virgil Van Dijk.

programme.title: Rush Scored Four
programme.desc: An LFC Original mini-documentary that relives the unforgettable afternoon at Goodison in 1982 when Ian Rush inspired the Reds to a famous 5-0 derby victory.

programme.title: Liverpool's Sound
programme.desc: Kop Chants and their Origins - We explore the history of Liverpool's unique and unrivalled songbook in an exclusive documentary.

programme.title: St John & Yeats Talk Shankly
programme.desc: Ian St John and Ron Yeats reflect on their time at Liverpool with the great Bill Shankly.

programme.title: Flags and Banners: The Art of LFC
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary which delves into the history and culture of the club's flags and banners.

programme.title: The RED Archive
programme.desc: Emma Case, daughter of Liverpool legend Jimmy, tells the story of how she created a unique mobile archive of fans¿ memorabilia.

programme.title: St John & Yeats Talk Shankly
programme.desc: Ian St John and Ron Yeats reflect on their time at Liverpool with the great Bill Shankly.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: A Day With: Hugo Ekitike
programme.desc: Liverpool¿s star forward is joined by Rubi Deschamps to delve into the Frenchman¿s life off the pitch and his start to life in Merseyside.

programme.title: Better Than Brazil
programme.desc: An LFC Originals mini-documentary that relives the famous night in April 1988 when Liverpool put five past Nottingham Forest.

programme.title: Us and Them: Manchester United
programme.desc: A documentary examining the intense rivalry that exists between Liverpool and Manchester United - focusing on history, culture and, of course, the football.

programme.title: Ee-Aye-Addio: 1965 and All That
programme.desc: Relive the glory of Liverpool's first FA Cup win in 1965 through the eyes of those who played a key role in ending 73 years of hurt.

programme.title: Shankly's Second Coming
programme.desc: An LFC Originals documentary that charts the rise of Bill Shanklys second great team and how it came to fruition with an unprecedented double in 1972/73.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Luis Diaz.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A look back at some of Divock Origi's greatest goals.

programme.title: Mo Salah: Record Breaker
programme.desc: Former LFC striker Neil Mellor and Opta data editor Michael Reid crunch the numbers on Mohamed Salah¿s incredible Liverpool career, which saw the Egyptian King rewrite the record books.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: Robbo: My Liverpool
programme.desc: A brand-new, exclusive LFC Original documentary paying tribute to Andy Robertson and his remarkable nine-year journey at Liverpool.

programme.title: Robbo: All the goals and assists
programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of goals and assists by Andy Robertson.

programme.title: Wembley Wizards: Liverpool's Cup Double
programme.desc: Relive the Reds successful Carabao Cup and FA Cup campaigns of 2021/22 in LFCTVs exclusive mini-documentary.

programme.title: Kop 10
programme.desc: Relive ten of Liverpool's most memorable away matches in the UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: Cup Kings
programme.desc: Relive the glory of Liverpool's previous six European Cup triumphs with back-to-back highlights of each victorious final.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: Ultimate XI
programme.desc: Liverpool legend John Barnes takes on the role of fantasy manager and reveals who would make it into his Ultimate XI.

programme.title: All the Goals
programme.desc: Relive every single one of Steven Gerrard's 186 goals for the Reds in a bumper three hour goal-fest.

programme.title: Goal Rush: U18 Season So Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool U18's 2025/26 season.

programme.title: Carragher
programme.desc: Upon his retirement in 2013, Jamie Carragher's former teammates, managers and opponents paid tribute to a true Anfield legend.

programme.title: Goal Rush: U21 Season so Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool U21s 2025/26 season.

programme.title: Bugsy Moran
programme.desc: A tribute to Liverpool's Sergeant Major. A documentary looking back on the illustrious Anfield career of Bootroom legend Ronnie Moran.

programme.title: Better Than Brazil
programme.desc: An LFC Originals mini-documentary that relives the famous night in April 1988 when Liverpool put five past Nottingham Forest.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: A Day With: Hugo Ekitike
programme.desc: Liverpool¿s star forward is joined by Rubi Deschamps to delve into the Frenchman¿s life off the pitch and his start to life in Merseyside.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In this LFC Originals exclusive, we visit the childhood home of Alisson Becker and discover the story of his first steps towards becoming one of the world¿s finest goalkeepers.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: We are in Rome for the second part of our exclusive documentary, learning how Alisson fought to establish himself in the Italian capital and in Jürgen Klopp¿s Liverpool plans.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In the final part of our story, we experience the incredible highs and devastating lows on and off the pitch as Alisson becomes a Reds legend and makes Liverpool his home.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of memorable goals scored by Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: Gerrard: My Liverpool
programme.desc: Liverpool legend Steven Gerrard relives the highs and lows of his illustrious Anfield career, featuring exclusive interviews with those who know him best.

programme.title: Bobby Doc
programme.desc: From the humble origins of his hometown in Brazil to the height of success with the Reds, this 'LFC Originals¿ documentary maps the life of samba star Roberto Firmino.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: Double Winners '86
programme.desc: On The March With Kenny's Army: A feature-length documentary telling the story of Liverpool's unforgettable 1985/86 double-winning season.

programme.title: European Royalty: The Joy of Six
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary in which we relive Liverpool's sixth European Cup victory in Madrid - and the subsequent parade which brought the city to a standstill.

programme.title: Goal Rush: Premier League Season So Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool's Premier League season so far.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Virgil Van Dijk.

programme.title: Liverpool's Sound
programme.desc: Kop Chants and their Origins - We explore the history of Liverpool's unique and unrivalled songbook in an exclusive documentary.

programme.title: Robbo: My Liverpool
programme.desc: A brand-new, exclusive LFC Original documentary paying tribute to Andy Robertson and his remarkable nine-year journey at Liverpool.

programme.title: Robbo: All the goals and assists
programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of goals and assists by Andy Robertson.

programme.title: Lisha: The First King Of The Kop
programme.desc: A documentary about the remarkable career of Elisha Scott, Liverpool's legendary Irish goalkeeper of the 20s and 30s.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: From TPC River Highlands in Cromwell, Conn.

programme.title: 2026 KPMG Women's PGA Championship

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Golf
programme.desc: From En-Joie Golf Club in Endicott, N.Y.

programme.title: Live: DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: Golfers manage moving day pressure for the third round at Circolo Golf Torino. Competitors navigate the challenging par-71 layout to climb the leaderboard, while the top tier fights to secure strong positioning before Sunday's final round.

programme.title: Live: Golf Central Pregame
programme.desc: Golf Central Pregame preps viewers for all the tournament action, with up-to-date scores, interviews, and analysis.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: Welcome to the NHL
programme.desc: Exclusive behind-the-scenes access to the top prospects in the NHL Draft. Gavin McKenna, Caleb Malhotra and Ivar Stenberg are predicted to be the top three picks by the Maple Leafs, Sharks and Canucks.

programme.title: Fairways of Life With Matt Adams
programme.desc: NY Times Best Selling Author and Golf Channel's Matt Adams brings you inside the ropes where you'll get all the headlines, exclusive interviews with all of golf's stars, equipment updates, instruction for your game and so much more.

programme.title: NESN Rundown
programme.desc: The best segments from today's NESN podcasts.

programme.title: Wicked Bites
programme.desc: The Wicked Bites crew is on the hunt for the best summer seafood. They hit the road to visit classic New England clam shacks and lobster pounds. The main stop is the legendary Clam Box of Ipswich to uncover why it's been a hit for decades.

programme.title: Dining Playbook With Billy and Jenny
programme.desc: A sports-themed look at the New England dining and lifestyle scene featuring celebrity chefs and favorite restaurants of local athletes.

programme.title: Meet Boston With Billy & Jenny
programme.desc: Boston influencers showcase different areas of the city and off-the-radar things to do.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie and Angela head to Nashville, Tenn.; Charlie hooks up with local fisherman Dillon Falardeau, hits the PBR for some bull riding and makes a visit to the Nashville Zoo.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: A social media post haunts Charlie as someone claims to have found the lost lake in the state of Florida. Mad Fish and the crew head to Florida in search of the lost lake.

programme.title: Grass Routes
programme.desc: Showcasing the connection between Minor League Baseball and the Portland Sea Dogs community.

programme.title: Up The Hearts Documentary
programme.desc: An inside look at the lead up to the Portland Hearts of Pine inaugural season in USL League One.

programme.title: Red Sox Report
programme.desc: An inside look at the 2026 Red Sox Hall of Fame Ceremony, inducting Jon Lester, Johnny Damon, Mike Timlin, and Sherm Feller into the Red Sox Hall of Fame alongside Bill Mueller's Memorable Moment with his walk-off home run against the Yankees.

programme.title: The Card Life
programme.desc: This month in Minneapolis, we talk with a collector who has over 3000 in-person autograph cards in his collection. We also visit the only baseball glove repair shop in the U.S. and highlight a card show designed just for kids with special needs.

programme.title: Cruisin' New England
programme.desc: Classic car collections, memorabilia and collectibles.

programme.title: Dirty Water TV
programme.desc: The best parties, hottest venues, and coolest destinations in New England nightlife.

programme.title: Minor League Baseball

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Presenting sumo by covering the rules, ranks, matchups and more.

programme.desc: Show 1 featuring Harumafuji, Kotooshu, Goeido and Kotoshogiku from the Nagoya basho, 2015.

programme.desc: Competitions in kickboxing and Muay Thai.

programme.title: Minor League Baseball
programme.desc: From Polar Park in Worcester, Mass.

programme.title: Golf Destination
programme.desc: An in-depth look at some of the world's greatest golf courses.

programme.title: A Fishing Story
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: New England Traveler
programme.desc: After a long, cold winter, Greg heads south of the border to Cancun, Mexico for a warm-weather escape. Atelier Resort in Playa Mujeres sets the stage for sailboat adventures, Caribbean cocktails, authentic Mexican cuisine, and a few surprises.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Anthony travels to historic Kittery, Maine and starts off his trip with a visit to Lil's Café for a famous cruller, then off to When Pigs Fly to check out their pizza. Anthony also visits a museum, a candy store and tries some unique seltzers.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie visits a lake he hasn't been on in a couple of years in search of largemouth and smallmouth bass; Charlie catches several pickerel; a boat breaks down and Charlie tows them back; a debate on the hot dog being a sandwich or not.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: A trip to Nashville, Tennessee, with a meet and greet with musician and star of America's Got Talent Dave Fenley. Dave talks to Charlie about his career. Charlie and Dave visit Carter's Vintage Guitars. Charlie attends Dave's concert.

programme.desc: From Polar Park in Worcester, Mass.

programme.title: NESN Clubhouse
programme.desc: Jaden learns all about the sport of rugby as he takes in a practice with the New England Free Jacks!

programme.title: Cruisin' New England
programme.desc: Classic car collections, memorabilia and collectibles.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: The "Mad Fisherman" brings you the best of New England fishing.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Anthony and the crew travel around America to find great food, drinks, fun and adventure.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: America's Mad Fisherman heads to the Green Mountain State of Vermont and fishes with long-time friend Joel St. Germain. Although fishing is good, the weather becomes the real issue.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Anthony heads to SkyVenture in Nashua, N.H., for a triple threat of adrenaline; watch as he catches air in the vertical wind tunnel and takes a tumble in the FishPipe, the world's first rotating barrel water slide.

programme.title: Outside the Fame
programme.desc: An in-depth look into the lives of current and former New England athletes that Boston fans may not otherwise have a chance to see.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Sparkle, Ritwik, Laura, and Natasha.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.desc: The Wellness Hour: Dr. Alvarez explores how Nuvia delivers a beautiful new smile in just 24 hours.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: The show where every word counts! Hosted by Meredith Vieira, two teams of celebrities and civilians face off in a fast-paced word game with a top prize of $10,000.

programme.title: Beat the Bridge
programme.desc: An interactive bridge dares players to cross by stepping on the right answers to challenging trivia questions; each step forward puts money in the team's bank, with bonus money for each successful crossing.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Switch
programme.desc: Jeff Hephner challenges contestants who are ranked based on their answers to trivia questions for a chance at $10,000; every question counts, as each answer can propel them to the top or to the bottom, where they'll be in jeopardy of elimination.

programme.title: Split Second
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins presents three contestants with a question and three possible choices and whoever buzzes in fastest earns the right to answer first.

programme.title: Tic Tac Dough
programme.desc: Two contestants compete to place three marks in a row on trivia board avoiding a dragon that can steal turns; the winner faces the dragon in a final round where it blocks three-in-a-row attempts to prevent the $10,000 prize win.

programme.title: Bingo Blitz
programme.desc: Contestants compete in a dynamic blend of trivia and bingo.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: Two teams of friends and family race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Ware family vs. Sawtelle family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Ware family vs. Schneider family.

programme.title: Family Feud Favorites
programme.desc: "Family Feud" has seen some crazy moments over the years, so buckle up as we revisit these fan favorites.

programme.desc: Celebrity contestants London Hughes, Fortune Feimster and Bobby Berk.

programme.title: Celebrity Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Mira Sorvino, Adam Rodriguez and Peter Schrager.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Teams of two everyday people battle trivia questions and a 40-foot wall for the chance to win millions of dollars. Part smarts, part luck and part guts, their victory is as unpredictable as the bounce of the ball.

programme.desc: Ware family vs. Hunt family.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: Two teams composed of celebrities and civilians go against each other in a fast-paced word game; guest stars Jessica Tuck, Nicole Sullivan, Lisa Kudrow and Illeana Douglas.

programme.title: Beat the Bridge
programme.desc: Three friends work together as they attempt to cross an iconic, interactive bridge by answering a series of general knowledge trivia questions where the game board is literally beneath their feet.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Switch
programme.desc: Jeff Hephner challenges contestants who are ranked based on their answers to trivia questions for a chance at $10,000; every question counts, as each answer can propel them to the top or to the bottom, where they'll be in jeopardy of elimination.

programme.title: Split Second
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins presents three contestants with a question and three possible choices and whoever buzzes in fastest earns the right to answer first.

programme.title: Tic Tac Dough
programme.desc: Brooke Burns hosts this exciting remake of the iconic game show, as two contestants compete head-to-head, answering trivia questions to earn plays on a giant game board, while the mischievous dragon tries to outwit their every move.

programme.title: Bingo Blitz
programme.desc: Contestants compete in a dynamic blend of trivia and bingo.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Maggie Sajak competes against "Jeopardy!" hosts Ken Jennings and Mayim Bialik; Pat Sajak's daughter Maggie fills in for Vanna at the board.

programme.title: Celebrity Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Dulé Hill, Sheryl Underwood and Peter Facinelli.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Teams of two everyday people battle trivia questions and a 40-foot wall for the chance to win millions of dollars. Part smarts, part luck and part guts, their victory is as unpredictable as the bounce of the ball.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: B1G Plus Encore
programme.desc: From March 8, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Plus Encore
programme.desc: From Dec. 6, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Hockey in 60
programme.desc: Featuring the Michigan vs. Michigan State, Notre Dame vs. Wisconsin and Ohio State vs. Minnesota men's ice hockey games.

programme.title: Men's College Wrestling
programme.desc: From Lorenzo Wrestling Complex in State College, Pa.

programme.title: B1G Plus Encore
programme.desc: Replays of the best action from Big Ten contests.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Hear from Penn State's Anthony Cassar, Mark Hall and more as they reflect on Cassar's journey to defeating Gable Steveson twice along the way to winning the national title in 2019.

programme.title: B1G Wrestling: On the Mat
programme.desc: Get to know Wisconsin's Zan Fugitt. Hear from Michigan's Beau and Brock Mantanona. Learn about Max McEnelly's journey to Minnesota wrestling. See how the Purdue program continues to strive for success.

programme.title: B1G Wrestling in 60
programme.desc: Replays of the week's best duals from around the Big Ten conference.

programme.title: B1G Wrestling: On the Mat
programme.desc: Hear from Mitchell Mesenbrink on his journey to Penn State and his career with the Nittany Lions. See how Indiana is building a strong team both on and off the mat. Learn how Danny Pucino is honoring his late father wrestling for Illinois this year.

programme.title: The B1G Story
programme.desc: A story of love and loss, follow the path of Iowa wrestler Alex Marinelli and how he and others in his life have persevered in the face of tragedy.

programme.title: Men's College Wrestling
programme.desc: From Carver-Hawkeye Arena in Iowa City, Iowa.

programme.title: B1G Wrestling in 60
programme.desc: Wrestling highlights from Big Ten matches.

programme.title: B1G Wrestling in 60
programme.desc: Replays of the week's best duals from around the Big Ten conference.

programme.title: Men's College Wrestling
programme.desc: From Lorenzo Wrestling Complex in State College, Pa.

programme.title: The B1G Story
programme.desc: The story of two of the most polarizing wrestlers in the history of the sport, Tom and Terry Brands. See how these small-town Iowa twins grew up to become international wrestling stars, Olympic champions and distinguished coaches.

programme.title: Men's College Wrestling
programme.desc: From Lorenzo Wrestling Complex in State College, Pa.

programme.title: B1G Wrestling: On the Mat
programme.desc: Hear from Mitchell Mesenbrink on his journey to Penn State and his career with the Nittany Lions. See how Indiana is building a strong team both on and off the mat. Learn how Danny Pucino is honoring his late father wrestling for Illinois this year.

programme.title: B1G Plus Encore
programme.desc: Replays of the best action from Big Ten contests.

programme.title: B1G Wrestling: On the Mat
programme.desc: Hear from Iowa's Michael Caliendo about his determination to become a national champion. Learn what fuels Ohio State's two-time NCAA champion, Jesse Mendez. See how Jace Morgan is following in his father's footsteps wrestling at Michigan State. Learn about Lenny Pinto's journey to Rutgers.

programme.title: B1G Plus Encore
programme.desc: From Feb. 1, 2026.

programme.title: Men's College Wrestling
programme.desc: From Jenison Field House in East Lansing, Mich.

programme.title: B1G Wrestling: On the Mat
programme.desc: Learn how Antrell Taylor honors his late father and brother wrestling for Nebraska. J.D. Perez's journey to Northwestern. Maryland's Jaxon Smith discusses his pursuit of a national title.

programme.title: B1G Wrestling: On the Mat
programme.desc: Get to know Wisconsin's Zan Fugitt. Hear from Michigan's Beau and Brock Mantanona. Learn about Max McEnelly's journey to Minnesota wrestling. See how the Purdue program continues to strive for success.

programme.title: B1G Wrestling: On the Mat
programme.desc: Hear from Iowa's Michael Caliendo about his determination to become a national champion. Learn what fuels Ohio State's two-time NCAA champion, Jesse Mendez. See how Jace Morgan is following in his father's footsteps wrestling at Michigan State. Learn about Lenny Pinto's journey to Rutgers.

programme.title: B1G Wrestling: On the Mat
programme.desc: Hear from Mitchell Mesenbrink on his journey to Penn State and his career with the Nittany Lions. See how Indiana is building a strong team both on and off the mat. Learn how Danny Pucino is honoring his late father wrestling for Illinois this year.

programme.title: On the Ice
programme.desc: Hear from Buckeye and Ohio native Nathan McBrayer. Learn about Minnesota's Mittelstadt brothers' relationship, Notre Dame's Cole Knuble on confidence and influence, and Penn State's rise with Gavin McKenna.

programme.title: On the Ice
programme.desc: Michigan's Michael Hage honors his late father. Hear from Penn State women's hockey star Katelyn Roberts and Wisconsin's Adam Pietila. Will Morlock helps the Spartans level up their game.

programme.title: On the Beam
programme.desc: Gianna Gerdes on her return to Minnesota. See how Isabel Sikon and the Cornhuskers are helping make dreams come true. Rutgers gymnastics' pursuit of excellence and the story behind "The Suitcase" for Ohio State.

programme.title: On the Beam
programme.desc: See how Michigan State's Sage Kellerman expresses herself through fashion. Get to know Michigan's Jahzara Ranger. Hear from Penn State gymnasts, Alyssa and Dylan Kramer. Learn about Mary McDonough's journey to becoming a standout all-arounder for Washington.

programme.title: On the Beam
programme.desc: UCLA's Ciena Alipio reflects on how her Native American and Filipino heritage shapes her identity on and off the mat. Illinois' Chloe Cho opens up about navigating the loss of her father and finding a second home in Champaign. Iowa's Maggie Ball shares her recruiting journey, as the daughter of Oklahoma Gymnastics coaches, forging her own path in the sport. Plus, the Maryland coaching staff discus

programme.title: On the Pitch
programme.desc: Maryland coach Sasho Cirovski on his efforts to grow the sport of college soccer and the legacy he wants to leave with the Terrapins. Being a Cornhusker runs in the family for Charlie Wistrom, the daughter of Nebraska football legend Grant Wistrom.

programme.title: On the Pitch
programme.desc: Hear from Michigan State's Brandon Munson. Michele Dalton returns home to Wisconsin. See how Julia and Grace Raich inspire inclusion at Penn State. Meet Ohio State's Jacinda and Jadin Bonham.

programme.title: On the Pitch
programme.desc: See how passion for playing soccer runs in the family for USC's Faith George. Hear the story of Chiara Singarella's journey from Argentina. Learn how goalkeeper Mia Hamant is continuing to inspire others. Coach Tracy Joyner and the Oregon Ducks.

programme.title: The B1G Story
programme.desc: Discover how Michigan's 2016–17 men's basketball team rebounded from an aborted plane takeoff en route to the Big Ten Tournament to win the conference title just days later.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Yaxel Lendeborg gives his mom a gift she will never forget. Learn about Morez Johnson Jr.'s connection with former Michigan football great, Tai Streets. Plus, go behind the scenes of the Wolverines' victory over the Fighting Illini in Champaign.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Hear from Illinois' Keaton Wagler. The Ivisic Brothers go from opponents to teammates. Kylan Boswell plays in front of his hometown Illini fans for the final time.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: See how Pryce Sandfort is creating a new identity for himself. Jamarques Lawrence on making the most of his chance to play for the Cornhuskers. Plus, an inside look at Nebraska's season with longtime radio announcer, Kent Pavelka.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Through challenges, signature wins and an epic Big Ten Tournament run, take a look back at Purdue's memorable season. Hear from Braden Smith, Trey Kaufman-Renn and Fletcher Loyer as they become the winningest trio in school history.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Iowa's Ben McCollum on what it means to be the head coach of his hometown team. Wisconsin's Nick Boyd looks to equal the accomplishments of former Badger and assistant coach, Brad Davison. Donovan Dent on what it means to play basketball at UCLA.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Hannes Steinbach on the legacy of German-born players at Washington. Hear from Illinois' Keaton Wagler. Learn about Morez Johnson Jr.'s connection with former Michigan football great, Tai Streets. Plus, go behind the scenes as the Wolverines travel to Champaign to face the Fighting Illini.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Diggy Coit shares his journey to becoming a scoring leader for Maryland. Ohio State's Bruce Thornton reflects on his connection with head coach Jake Diebler. An inside look at Nebraska's season with longtime radio announcer, Kent Pavelka.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Learn how Bennett Stirtz has earned the nickname Iron Man at Iowa. Kayden Mingo shares what he's learned during his time at Penn State. Tariq Francis on keeping up production at Rutgers.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Lamar Wilkerson shares his journey to Bloomington, Indiana. Donovan Dent on what it means to play basketball at UCLA, then go behind the scenes as the Bruins face Jeremy Fears Jr. and the Michigan State Spartans.

programme.title: On The Court
programme.desc: Hear from Iowa's Hannah Stuelke. Get to know Maryland's Saylor Poffenbarger. Learn how Minnesota's Dawn Plitzuweit inspires her players and Illinois' Berry Wallace's Big Ten family ties.

programme.title: On The Court
programme.desc: Indiana's coach Rhet Wierzba continues to inspire as he battles cancer. Ohio State's Jaloni Cambridge has a passion for building LEGO sets. Hear about Gift Uchenna's journey to Wisconsin. Madison Layden-Zay discusses her decision to return to Purdue.

programme.title: On The Court
programme.desc: Featuring Husker Radio's Matt Coatney and Jeff Griesch, Northwestern's Sammy White, Oregon's Mia Jacobs, Rutgers' Imani Lester and Washington's Elle Ladine, Hannah Stines, and Sayvia Sellers.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Football
programme.desc: Julian Sayin's journey to becoming Ohio State's starting quarterback. See Purdue honor running back, Devin Mockobee. Hear why Max Bredeson followed in his brothers' footsteps at Michigan.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Football
programme.desc: An all-access look at the 2025 Big Ten Football Championship in Indianapolis. Go behind-the-scenes as the Indiana Hoosiers face-off against the Ohio State Buckeyes.

programme.title: B1G Trailblazers
programme.desc: Mark Cuban, businessman and TV personality, sits down with Dave Revsine to discuss his time as a student at Indiana University and how it influenced his trailblazing career.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From David F. Couch Ballpark in Winston Salem, N.C.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Florida State Seminoles (7-10) visit the Miami Hurricanes (15-2) at Watsco Center. Tre Donaldson (16.9 PPG) leads the Seminoles against a Miami team that is on a ten-game win streak with Robert McCray V in an ACC rivalry clash broadcast.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: Original content and storytelling that focuses on student-athlete features from a variety of the conference's 27 varsity sports.

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: From JoAnne Graf Field in Tallahassee, Fla.

programme.title: Women's College Soccer
programme.desc: From Klöckner Stadium in Charlottesville, Va.

programme.title: Women's College Beach Volleyball
programme.desc: From Gulf Beach Place in Gulf Shores, Ala.

programme.title: Women's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: From the Seminole Lacrosse Complex in Tallahassee, Fla.

programme.title: Women's College Soccer
programme.desc: Quarterfinal.

programme.title: Women's College Soccer
programme.desc: Championship.

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: Championship.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Seminoles put 2024 in the rearview during this opener against the No. 8 Crimson Tide. Florida State went a forgettable 2-10 last year. Alabama turns to Ty Simpson at quarterback after Jalen Milroe was drafted by the NFL's Seattle Seahawks.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From Mike Martin Field at Dick Hoswer Stadium in Tallahassee, Fla.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The ACC-leading No. 7 Yellow Jackets (7-0, 4-0) host the Orange (3-4, 1-3) in Atlanta. Syracuse squeaked out a 31-28 victory over Georgia Tech last season. The Orange are 0-3 since starting quarterback Steve Angeli went down for the season.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Boston College Eagles travel to Atlanta to face the Georgia Tech Yellow Jackets. Entering the new year, Georgia Tech (9-4, 0-0 ACC) has found its rhythm, riding a four-game winning streak. Donald Hand Jr. leads the Eagles in scoring (15.8 PPG).

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: From McWhorter Stadium in Clemson, S.C.

programme.title: Women's College Basketball
programme.desc: Georgia Tech meets Florida State in ACC Tournament action at the Gas South Arena in Duluth, Ga. The Yellow Jackets are the 11 seed and the Seminoles are No. 14. The winner meets Virginia Tech in the second round.

programme.title: Women's College Volleyball
programme.desc: From Memorial Gymnasium in Charlottesville, Va.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: Championship.

programme.title: Women's College Basketball
programme.desc: The Yellow Jackets host the No. 18 Fighting Irish for a New Year's ACC matchup. Hannah Hidalgo leads the Irish offense, averaging 25.1 points per game. Both teams battle for conference supremacy and look to gain critical ACC points.

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: From Tech Softball Park in Blacksburg, Va.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From Russ Chandler Stadium in Atlanta.
